title: How Waico is democratising AI
description: The global artificial intelligence landscape is undergoing a profound transformation, moving away from restrictive, exclusionary models towards a collaborative, inclusive architecture designed to empower the Global South. The establishment of the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organisation (Waico) in Shanghai marks a pivotal shift towards a multipolar era of digital governance, prioritising sovereignty, inclusivity, and shared prosperity.

title: SAP CFO says AI must move beyond chatbot 'low-hanging fruit' before seeing returns
description: SAP's finance chief said on Thursday that artificial intelligence in enterprise software must move beyond chatbots and coding tools into more ​complex business processes, where clean data, reliability and cost control matter ‌more than access to the most powerful model.
content: Companies have poured money into generative AI but are still seeking evidence of broad productivity gains, and SAP is arguing that ​the returns will come less from general-purpose models than from ​governed systems embedded in specific business proce... [1517 chars]

title: How Taxpayers Residing Near Data Centers May Be Impacted By Trump’s Policy
description: Americans living near new artificial intelligence data centers could see changes to their electricity bills.
content: Americans living near new artificial intelligence (AI) data centers could see changes to their electricity bills, local taxes, jobs and infrastructure as the Trump administration pushes a new plan aimed at shifting the costs of the AI boom away from ... [13422 chars]

title: Artificial intelligence: Moving beyond the GPU
description: Artificial intelligence infrastructure is evolving as AMD, Supermicro, Vast Data, TensorWave and Crusoe build full-stack solutions for the AI era.
content:
Global adoption of artificial intelligence has reshaped many landscapes over the past few years, including the competitive dynamics of the technology industry itself.

title: Alabama updates ethics guidance for lawyers amid worries about AI misuse
description: The Alabama State Bar said lawyers using artificial intelligence cannot charge clients for hours saved by the technology but can bill for time they spend reviewing and ​exercising their judgment over AI-generated work, according to new guidance issued this week. ‌The guidelines come as more state courts and attorney regulatory authorities weigh rules and best practices for the emerging technology.

title: Trump tries to soothe data center fears
description: President Donald Trump on Thursday had governors and electricity companies join a voluntary pledge to shield U.S. consumers from higher utility bills from data centers — a sign of how the artificial intelligence build-out has become a lightning rod of controversy before the midterm elections.
